name: Falafel 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Puree the beans and parsley in a blender.
3. Add the remaining ingredients (except oil) to the bowl and mix well.
4. Spoon the mixture onto a baking sheet and flatten each patty.
5. Brush with oil.
6. Bake until crusty and golden, about 15 minutes.
7. This can be reheated once cooked by frying in hot oil with some seasonings in the oil.
